name: ElyOtto
description: '''Elliott Ferrous-Martin Platt''' (born February 24, 2004), known professionally as '''ElyOtto''', is a Canadian [[hyperpop]] and [[Pop music|pop]] musician. He{{efn|ElyOtto's preferred pronouns are temperamental; he currently uses he/him pronouns.<ref>{{cite web | title=Instagram | url=https://www.instagram.com/ely0tto/ }}</ref>}} is best known for his song "[[SugarCrash!]]", which went viral on [[TikTok]] in early 2021.
